headline: Merck TARGAN Deal Highlights Poultry Tech Push And Undervalued Share Price
summary: Merck Animal Health has agreed to acquire TARGAN, a biodevice company focused on poultry solutions. The deal adds automated, technology driven tools aimed at the poultry sector to Merck's animal health offering. This marks a further step for Merck into animal health technologies alongside its human medicines business. Merck (NYSE:MRK) is drawing fresh attention after its animal health unit moved to acquire TARGAN, a poultry focused biodevice developer. With the share price at $120.76 and a...
